summary: Implemented receipt image export action (US-018). Created `src/ui/receipt-to-image.ts` using html2canvas to capture the receipt DOM element as a PNG blob, and `src/ui/share-image-button.ts` with loading/success/error state feedback and auto-revert after 2 seconds. Integrated the Share Image button into `fingerprint-receipt.ts` between Copy and Re-run Audit buttons. Added CSS styles for loading, success, and error states in `receipt.css` with reduced-motion and mobile flex-wrap support. Added html2canvas as a devDependency. All 791 tests pass including 28 new US-018 tests.
